framework: HIPAA Security Rule — Technical Safeguards (45 CFR 164.312)
description: Maps the 164.312 technical safeguards to the audit events that evidence them in a MakerChecker bundle. A crosswalk, not a certification or a SRA.

clauses.title: Access control — allow access only to authorized persons or software programs
clauses.requirement: Only authorized roles may perform an action; unauthorized access is denied.

clauses.title: Audit controls — record and examine activity in systems that contain or use ePHI
clauses.requirement: System activity is recorded in an examinable audit trail.

clauses.title: Integrity — protect ePHI from improper alteration or destruction
clauses.requirement: Improper alteration of the record is prevented or detectable.

clauses.title: Mechanism to authenticate ePHI — corroborate that data has not been altered or destroyed
clauses.requirement: A mechanism exists to confirm records have not been altered.
clauses.note: The hash chain is the corroborating mechanism: any alteration fails verification at the altered seq.

clauses.title: Person or entity authentication — verify the identity acting on ePHI
clauses.requirement: Actions are attributable to an authenticated identity.
clauses.note: Decisions require an authenticated decider; unauthenticated gate decisions are refused.
